dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.overview: Financial overview with your real-time activity and location insights.
dashboard.notLoggedIn: You are not logged in. Please log in to see your dashboard.
dashboard.noTransactions: You have no transactions. Please add some transactions to see your dashboard.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.notLoggedIn: You are not logged in. Please log in to see your transactions.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.notLoggedIn: Please log in to use analytics
analytics.apiKeyDescription: Connect your own key for portfolio analysis. Supported:

monobank.title: Monobank API
monobank.safeInfo: This integration is read-only and safe. FinTrack can only fetch data for analysis. It cannot create or execute real bank transactions.
monobank.rangeLimit: Statement range limit: max 31 days + 1 hour (2,682,000 seconds).
monobank.cooldownLimit: Monobank API cooldown: one request per 60 seconds.
monobank.nextStep: Next step: choose card and action mode in popup
monobank.storageDesc: Remove all previously saved Monobank transactions from your DB.
monobank.readonlyDesc: Read-only list. Edit and delete actions are disabled for Monobank data.
monobank.noTransactionsYet: No Monobank transactions to show yet.
monobank.selectAccountDesc: Select a card account and action mode.
monobank.actionModeTitle: What to do after loading transactions?
monobank.waitBeforeRequest: Wait {{seconds}}s before the next Monobank request.
monobank.tokenInvalid: Please provide a valid Monobank token.
monobank.removedMessage: Deleted {{deleted}} Monobank transaction(s) from your database.
monobank.selectOneAccount: Select one card account to continue.

errors.unexpectedDashboard: Unexpected error happened while loading dashboard.
errors.unexpectedAnalytics: Unexpected error happened while loading analytics.
errors.unexpectedTransactions: Unexpected error happened while loading transactions.
errors.aiKeyLimitDesc: Your API key has hit its rate limit. Wait or replace the key.
errors.aiKeyInvalidDesc: Your API key is invalid or expired. Check and try again.
errors.aiDefaultLimitDesc: The default AI key is exhausted. Add your own key to continue.
errors.aiAllFailedDesc: All AI keys are unavailable. Please add your own Groq or Gemini key.
errors.aiUsingDefaultDesc: Your personal API key is not active now. FinTrack will use the default AI key for this request.

admin.title: ADMIN PANEL
admin.subtitle: Manage roles, sessions, user metrics, and client error logs.
admin.accessDenied: Access denied. This page is available only for administrators.

charts.title: Admin insights
charts.subtitle: Visual overview of users and error activity.

donation.notLoggedIn: Please log in to open the Donation Stripe page.
donation.pageDescription: Donations help us maintain FinTrack and unlock unlimited AI analytics for your account.
donation.benefit2: Priority support of ongoing project development.
donation.benefit3: Fast activation after Stripe webhook confirmation.
donation.leaderboardSubtitle: Live ranking by total donation amount.
donation.leaderboardEmpty: No donations yet. Be the first supporter.
donation.faq: FAQ: Access is activated by webhook event checkout.session.completed. If you closed the page, just reopen Analytics after a few seconds.
donation.failedPopupMessage: Please try again in a few seconds.
donation.successPopupMessage: Payment was accepted. Unlimited AI analytics access will be activated after webhook confirmation.
donation.canceledPopupMessage: No charge was made. You can start donation again whenever you want.
